title: Bootstrap Open Outcome spec v0.1.0 plus reference SDKs
question: Does opensubagents outcomes ship v0.1.0 of the Open Outcome spec with reference Python and TypeScript SDKs whose verifier implementations agree on the canonical floor of 3.5?
success_criteria: specification README documents the OutcomeDeclaration Report and Verdict shapes
sdk-python ships HeuristicVerifier with 5 dimensions and a canonical floor of 3.5
sdk-typescript ships an equivalent verifier with the same dimensions and the same floor
